label: 建筑开门
description: 在墙体网格中随机打开指定数量和宽度的门洞，门洞仅在有效墙段（两侧具有贯通空间）上生成。
description-en: Randomly punches door openings of specified count and width into a wall grid; openings are only placed on valid wall segments that connect two open spaces.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。建筑俯视平面图，深色矩形墙体轮廓上有2~3个缺口表示门洞，门洞处用亮色（米白或浅黄）填充，形象表达开门动作。主色深灰墙体配米白门洞，简洁现代。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 墙体网格列表
inputs.description: 墙体掩码网格列表，每个网格的非零值视为墙体
inputs.description-en: List of wall mask grids; non-zero values in each grid are treated as wall cells.

inputs.name: doorCount
inputs.label: 开门数量
inputs.description-en: Total number of door openings to place.

inputs.name: doorWidth
inputs.label: 门宽（格）
inputs.description: 每个门洞沿墙方向的宽度（格子数），最小为1
inputs.description-en: Width of each door opening in cells along the wall direction; minimum is 1.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses the current timestamp.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 开门后墙体列表
outputs.description: 与输入列表一一对应，每个网格中门洞处=0，其余保持原值
outputs.description-en: List of grids corresponding to input; door opening cells=0, all others retain original values.

outputs.name: doorGridList
outputs.label: 门列表
outputs.description: 与输入列表一一对应，每个网格中门洞处=1，其余为0
outputs.description-en: List of grids corresponding to input; door opening cells=1, all other cells=0.
